About Namrta Jain

Founder & Lead Instructor

My Journey with Yoga

Hello, I'm Namrta Jain. I am a dedicated wellness coach with over 6 years of experience in the health and fitness industry. My journey into yoga quickly transformed into a lifelong dedication to complete body and mind wellness.

At Let's MoveOn Yoga, I aim to create a space that feels personal, welcoming, and grounded. This isn't just about physical postures; it's about connecting with yourself, finding stillness in a busy world, and nurturing your overall well-being. My approach always carries a strong focus on mental, physical, emotional, and spiritual balance.

Over the years, I have personally guided over 500 clients toward healthier, happier lifestyles through personalized in-person and virtual sessions. Whether you are stepping onto the mat for the first time or seeking to deepen a long-standing practice, I am here to guide you with my calm teaching style, patience, and genuine personal attention to every student.

Certifications & Expertise

  • MA in Yoga
  • DNYS Certification
  • Certified Zumba Aerobics Trainer
  • 6+ Years of Industry Experience
  • Expertise: Therapeutic Yoga, Strength Training, Pain Management, Women's Health, Meditation

Let's MoveOn Yoga

Complete body and mind wellness with Namrata Jain in Jaipur, Rajasthan.
